chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA 1st Criminal Bail No.S-731 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 3188/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on withdrawal statement as flag “B”. 3. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 4. For hearing of Bail Application. ------ 30.06.2025 Syed Lal Shah, Advocate for the Applicants. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that the compromise between the parties has taken place and he intends to file compromise application before the learned trial Court, therefore, he does not press this Criminal Bail Application. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Manzoor
